name: inferlab
description: Agent Skill for operating the Inferlab CLI: reproducible LLM inference experiments with file-first evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Run reproducible LLM inference experiments with the Inferlab CLI.
interface.longDescription: A reusable Agent Skill for driving Inferlab: versioned workspaces, serve lifecycles, closed-loop eval/bench recipes, runtime images, and file-first execution records.
defaultPrompt: Start the serving recipe and run a bench against it.
Run the closed-loop recipe and summarize the record.
Reproduce this experiment from its record.
